name: Memory Bootstrap
sequence: Initialize memory system connection at session start. Query Neo4j for prior implementations before coding.

name: Query Memory
sequence: Search Neo4j for previous implementations, patterns, and architectural decisions.

name: Log Memory
sequence: Log implementation reflections to Neo4j after completing work.

name: Orchestrate Task
sequence: Coordinate the surgical team for a task. Delegate to appropriate subagents.

name: Plan Implementation
sequence: Create implementation plan following Brooksian principles.

name: Build Feature
sequence: Execute delegated coding tasks with memory-aware patterns.

name: Test Memory
sequence: Test memory system integrity and persistence.

name: Review Code
sequence: Review code for security, Steel Frame compliance, and memory best practices.

name: Validate Build
sequence: Validate builds, types, and memory integrity.
